creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #4)
The 'shared search' fails ("The search named all open, non-obsolete patch, maintainer-approval + has not been made visible to you.").

But the 'public search' does come up with a list of bugs.  That seems like a reasonable replacement for the current "read to be taken by a committer" dasboard link.
